result.expected_warning_text: 민감정보가 포함된 요청은 보안 정책에 의해 차단되었습니다
result.submission_evidence: Snapshot captured '대답 생성 중지' (Stop generating) button at (1437,596) confirming prompt was submitted and Gemini started processing.
result.submission_method: Ctrl+Shift+J focus trick + clipboard paste. Prompt auto-submitted during Snapshot capture.
result.response_summary: Prompt submitted. Gemini entered processing state (stop button visible). APF blocked the HTTP/2 response stream. Page reverted to home screen with text remaining in input field. No warning text, no error message, no conversation history — identical to #110 behavior.
result.strategy_d_result: GOAWAY=false (Strategy D) produces the same outcome as GOAWAY=true (#110). Both result in page reset with no visible warning or error to user. The batchexecute response is being blocked before Gemini can parse it.
result.comparison_with_110: #110 used GOAWAY=true and page reset. #112 uses GOAWAY=false and page also resets. End result identical — APF blocks the response stream regardless of GOAWAY setting, and Gemini silently resets.
result.note: Phase3-B7: Gemini GOAWAY changed from true to false (Strategy D). is_http2=1, end_stream=true, GOAWAY=false. Warning text not delivered. The batchexecute protocol may require a different injection approach — neither GOAWAY=true nor GOAWAY=false successfully delivers warning content to Gemini's Angular frontend.
